title: crassula alba var. pallida
intro: Crassula alba var. pallida is a succulent plant species, commonly known as the 'Milk and Woolly Crassula', belonging to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, which can be attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Crassula alba var. pallida include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
